title: What brotherhood actually costs
caption:
Most men have friends. Very few have brothers.

A friend likes your post when things go well. A brother gets in the car when things fall apart.

Real brotherhood costs something. You show up in person, not just the thread. You say the thing that might crack the friendship because it's what he actually needs. You ask the specific question — not "how are you" but "how's your prayer life" and then sit with the answer.

And when things go sideways — when he's wrong, when he's lost, when the story gets uncomfortable — you stay.

"A friend loves at all times, and a brother is born for a time of adversity." — Proverbs 17:17

Two or three men who have your number and will actually use it. That's the room God does His best work in.

Send this to the brother you've been meaning to call.

#faith #brotherhood #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #accountability #realmen #christianity #proverbs
